## Meeting Purpose

[Walkthrough of HockeyStack's Webflow-based website editing process for GrowthX team.](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Webflow admin access via "?edit" URL param; simple UI for content updates](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [CMS structure: static pages, collections (blogs, case studies, etc.), direct text edits](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Publishing process: make changes, click "Publish" (blue button) to go live](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)
  - [Blog categories flexible; avoid "HockeyStack users" for product updates](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)

## Topics

### Webflow Admin Access

  - [Access admin panel: add "?edit" to URL end](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [Login bar appears at bottom of screen](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [Sections: Pages (static), Collections (CMS), Forms](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)

### Content Management

  - [Pages tab: 455 total site pages (home, pricing, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)
  - [Collections: backend CMS (blogs, case studies, reviews, categories)](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)
  - [Blog editing: modify title, body, category, URL directly](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Static page edits: click pencil icon on text/images for inline changes](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)

### Publishing Process

  - [Any content change activates blue "Publish" button](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
  - [Click "Publish" to push changes live on domain](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Forms data bypasses Webflow, connects directly to HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)

### Blog Categories

  - [Flexible category creation (e.g., content marketing, industry overviews)](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [Avoid "HockeyStack users" category (reserved for product updates)](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=586.0)
  - [New categories can be added via "+" icon](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Erik to start using Webflow for content updates](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
  - [Amulya to review Calibramind blog and other shared assets](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)
  - [Amulya to introduce GrowthX team to John (HockeyStack designer)](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [Team to use appropriate blog categories, proposing new ones as needed](https://fathom.video/share/h6m5nFtkMGn4ajDN5iyP_mZmxBhGCoTW?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
